mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booking (user_id, scooter_id, hire_option_code, start_time, scheduled_end_time, cost, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{scooterId}, #{hireOptionCode}, #{startTime}, #{scheduledEndTime}, #{cost}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM booking WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM booking ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE booking SET hire_option_code = #{hireOptionCode}, start_time = #{startTime}, scheduled_end_time = #{scheduledEndTime}, actual_end_time = #{actualEndTime}, actual_duration_minutes = #{actualDurationMinutes}, cost = #{cost}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE booking SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(start_time) as bookingDate, SUM(cost) as totalCost, COUNT(*) as bookingCount FROM booking WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND start_time >= #{startDate} AND start_time < #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(start_time) ORDER BY bookingDate ASC
